headline: GoDaddy (GDDY) Stock Valuation After AI Disruption Concerns And Dotcom Pricing Scrutiny
summary: GoDaddy (GDDY) is back in focus after emerging AI tools and an aggressive promotional push on dotcom domains raised fresh questions about its core website business, earnings resilience, and investor confidence. See our latest analysis for GoDaddy. At a share price of US$76.24, GoDaddy has seen its 7 day share price return fall 9.65% and its year to date share price return decline 35.67%. The 1 year total shareholder return is down 56.62%, reflecting how concerns around AI driven disruption,...
